sub_modules.fp_bpf_coeff_rom: Combinational hard-coded coefficient ROM containing the public 31-tap band-pass coefficient list and zero coefficients beyond tap 30.
sub_modules.fp_bpf_fp32_to_q16: Combinational IEEE-754 single-precision to signed Q16.16 fixed-point converter for input samples.
sub_modules.fp_bpf_coeffs_to_q30: Combinational coefficient conversion block that maps flattened IEEE-754 coefficients into signed Q2.30 fixed-point values.
sub_modules.fp_bpf_mac_tree: Combinational FIR multiply-accumulate block over the shifted samples and fixed-point coefficients.
sub_modules.fp_bpf_q16_to_fp32: Combinational signed Q16.16 fixed-point to IEEE-754 single-precision converter for the filtered output.
